title: Shadows
description: This module provides a comprehensive treatment of real-time shadow rendering from classic shadow mapping through ray-traced contact-hardening shadows with temporal denoising. Shadow rendering is one of the most technically demanding and visually impactful areas of real-time graphics; the techniques here are drawn directly from shipping implementations in DECIMA's cascade blending, ID Tech 7's EVSM shadows, and the DXR shadow pipeline in Cyberpunk 2077. Prerequisite: Modules 7 and 9.
